title: Apple overtakes Nvidia as world’s most valuable company amid AI selloff
description: Apple overtook Nvidia on Friday to become the world’s most valuable publicly traded company, as renewed selling pressure on artificial intelligence-related stocks
content:
Apple overtook Nvidia on Friday to become the world’s most valuable publicly traded company, as renewed selling pressure on artificial intelligence-related stocks weighed on the chipmaker.

title: Generated, Echoing Broader Tech Shift – NaturalNews.com
description: Over 95% of Coinbase’s Code Now Written Using AI, Executive Says More than 95% of the code produced by cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase is now generated using artificial intelligence, according to a company executive. The statement was made by Rob Witoff, a director at Coinbase, during a presentation, as reported by Cointelegraph. The figure covers both […]
content:

title: AI Will Make IT Services More Important, Not Replace Them: Anand Mahindra
description: Tech Mahindra Chairman Anand Mahindra said artificial intelligence will create major opportunities for the IT sector rather than diminish its role. Addressing concerns over AI replacing IT services, he said companies will become crucial in integrating, governing and applying AI solutions for businesses while India must emerge as a creator of AI capabilities
content:
Tech Mahindra Chairman Anand Mahindra has dismissed concerns that artificial intelligence could weaken India’s IT services industry, saying AI will instead create one of the biggest growth opportunities for the sector.

title: China makes its latest play to become dominant player in AI
description: China has formed the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization, based in Shanghai, to promote AI governance
content:

title: Guterres: AI must be shaped by 'all of humanity', not a handful of powers
description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres on Friday urged governments and technology companies to work together to ensure artificial intelligence (AI) benefits all countries.
content: Speaking at the opening ceremony of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai, Mr. Guterres described AI as "humanity's greatest opportunity in the 21st century", but cautioned that it could also become "one of its greatest risk... [3051 chars]

title: Global Times: Head-of-state diplomacy shines at WAIC, fostering ties and advancing global governance consensus
description: BEIJING, July 18, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Chinese President Xi Jinping on Friday held a series of high-level meetings on the sidelines of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance in Shanghai, sitting down successively with Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul, Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet, and UN Secretary-General António Guterres. The bustling diplomatic activity transformed the WAIC from a premier showcase of AI technologies and industrial breakthroughs into a vibrant platform for head-of-state diplomacy and global governance coordination.
content: BEIJING, July 18, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Chinese President Xi Jinping on Friday held a series of high-level meetings on the sidelines of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance in Shanghai... [7618 chars]

title: WeRide Named Among China's Top 10 AI Case Studies for UAE Autonomous Driving Deployment, the Only Autonomous Driving Company Recognized
description: SHANGHAI, July 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WeRide (NASDAQ: WRD; HKEX: 0800), a global leader in autonomous driving technology, today announced that its autonomous driving deployment in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) has been selected as one of the Top 10 examples of international cooperation in Chinese AI technologies and products in AI From China Benefits the World (2026), in a national case collection released at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC).
